creator: johans@FreeBSD.org
text:
Rodrigo OSORIO wrote:
> I just realize I didn't bump the PORTREVISION number in the patch.
> Please, add this minor change after applying the patch.

A revision bump is not needed when fixing a build error. People for whom
this patch is relevant, wouldn't have an older version that needs to be
upgraded. And people who did managed to build and install the previous
version, won't need this patch.

The patch looks good. I'll run some tests and plan to commit it this
evening, or tomorrow. Thank you.


Regards,
Johan
